name: ExtensionsManager
summary: The ExtensionsManager class provides a way of accessing the SketchupExtensions that have been registered via the Sketchup.register_extension method. There is only one ExtensionsManager available. You access it via the Sketchup.extensions method.

methods.summary: The [] method is used to get an extension by name, index or ID.
methods.remarks: The [] method is used to get an extension by name, index or ID.

params.name: index_or_name
params.doc: The index, name or ID of the SketchupExtension object.

methods.name: count
methods.summary: Note: Since SketchUp 2014 the count method is inherited from Ruby's Enumerable mix-in module.
methods.remarks: Note: Since SketchUp 2014 the count method is inherited from Ruby's Enumerable mix-in module. Prior to that the #count method is an alias for #length.

methods.name: each
methods.summary: The #each method is used to iterate through extensions.
methods.remarks: The #each method is used to iterate through extensions.

methods.name: keys
methods.summary: The keys method is used to get a list of keys in the ExtensionsManager, which are the same as the names of the extensions.
methods.remarks: The keys method is used to get a list of keys in the ExtensionsManager, which are the same as the names of the extensions.

methods.name: length
methods.summary: The #length method returns the number of SketchupExtension objects inside this ExtensionsManager.
methods.remarks: The #length method returns the number of SketchupExtension objects inside this ExtensionsManager.

methods.name: size
methods.summary: The #size method is an alias of #length.
methods.remarks: The #size method is an alias of #length.
